hooks.command: git fetch origin master --quiet 2>/dev/null && { git diff --quiet && git diff --cached --quiet && git reset --hard origin/master --quiet && echo "[SessionStart] Allineato a origin/master ($(git rev-parse --short HEAD))" || echo "[SessionStart] Working tree non pulito: reset saltato, ref remoti aggiornati"; } || echo "[SessionStart] fetch fallito: nessun allineamento"
